prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant, 430 HP, 424 lb-ft)** with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission**, retaining the original Dana 300 transfer case for off-road capability. Use a **Holley HP EFI system** with a **FAST XFI Sportsman ECU** for precise fuel and ignition tuning, paired with a **K&N Cold Air Intake (63-1561)** and **Hooker Blackheart 1.75" headers** for optimized exhaust flow.

Suspension overhaul with **Old Man Emu (OME) BP-51 2.5" internal bypass shocks** (front and rear) and **Poly Performance 3.5" lift kit** with **Currie Enterprises 9" high-pinion reverse-rotation rear axle** (35-spline, ARB Air Locker) and **Dynatrac Pro-Rock 60 front axle** (4340 chromoly shafts, 35-spline). Install **RuffStuff Specialties heavy-duty front and rear bump stops** to prevent suspension damage.

Forced induction via a **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (62mm, 58lb/min) with a **Turbonetics Deltagate 40 wastegate**, **Mishimoto LS3 intercooler (MMINT-LS3-14ROW)**, and **ID1000 fuel injectors** (1000cc/min). Use a **Nitrous Express GenX Direct Port system (150-shot)** for on-demand power, controlled via a **Holley Dominator ECU** with traction control and launch control.
estetica: Full **Rusty Knuckle Off-Road CJ-5 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, quarter panels, and hood) with **Bushwacker Flat Style Pocket Flares** for a 4" wider stance. Paint in **PPG Deltron DBC9700 "Satin Black Cherry"** with **3M Scotchcal Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the hood and roof for contrast.

Custom **Poison Spyder Customs front and rear bumpers** (with integrated **WARN Zeon 12-S winch** and **Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods**). Install a **GenRight Off-Road aluminum tube rear swing-out tire carrier** with a **BFGoodrich KM3 37x12.50R17** mounted on **Method MR701 beadlock wheels (17x9, +12 offset)**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Corbeau GTS II Pro seats** (4-point harnesses), **Rugged Ridge XHD roll cage (4-point, DOM tubing)**, and **RaceQuip SFI-certified fire suppression system**. Dash overlay with **AutoMeter Ultra-Lite gauges (boost, EGT, fuel pressure, oil temp)** and a **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel** on a **NRG Innovations quick-release hub**.
